title: Sister tennis-ball pass
prompt: Wide shot of @tennis-court — green court with white lines, low net softly visible BACKGROUND, chain-link fence, soft warm afternoon light. POSITION LOCK — Sara stays in her exact spot on the LEFT side of the court throughout. Eva stays in her exact spot on the RIGHT side of the court throughout, about 6 feet apart from Sara. Neither girl crosses the court — only the tennis ball travels between them. @Sara already CENTER-LEFT standing on the green court surface with both feet planted, ponytail with bow under @pink-helmet (buckled), holding the soft yellow @tennis-ball gently in her right hand at chest height in a 'about to roll' pose. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible — right hand on ball, left hand softly at her side. Sara stays at this exact spot throughout the entire 10s. @Eva already CENTER-RIGHT standing on the green court surface about 6 feet from Sara with both feet planted, curly blonde hair under @teal-helmet (buckled), both hands cupped softly together in front of her at hip height in a 'ready to catch' pose. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both cupped together. Eva stays at this exact spot throughout the entire 10s. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Sara softly tosses the soft yellow tennis ball with a gentle underhand motion in a low arc toward Eva. The ball travels in a gentle arc from Sara's right hand toward Eva. Sara (cheerful kid-voice, warm and bright): "Catch it, Eva!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva gently catches the ball with both her cupped hands at hip height, beaming with delighted kid pride. Eva (cheerful giggle, both hands now around the ball): "Caught it! My turn!" Both girls stay in their exact spots, ball now in Eva's hands. Calm cheerful warm kid-show ambiance throughout. STRICT ANATOMY: Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — right hand on ball (until release), left at side. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both cupped together. Both girls stay grounded with both feet on the court throughout — no leaping, no jumping, no running across the court. Helmets stay buckled. Ball is plain SOFT YELLOW — no other color, no red, no marks. The tennis court stays plain clean.
